channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
item.description: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/how-chatgpt-adoption-has-expanded

item.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
item.description: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/core-dump-epidemiology-data-infrastructure-bug

item.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
item.description: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/mapping-ai-jobs-transition-eu

item.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
item.description: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/previewing-gpt-5-6-sol

item.title: How agents are transforming work
item.description: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/how-agents-are-transforming-work

item.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/openai-broadcom-jalapeno-inference-chip

item.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
item.description: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-immunology-mystery

item.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
item.description: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/helping-build-shared-standards-for-advanced-ai

item.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
item.description: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/omio
